channel.title: Comments on: Captain Lawrence Barrel Select American Sour Ale, Ep. 111
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Edmond M.
item.dc:creator: Edmond M.
item.description: One of my favorite gems out of NY. Their Barleywine (Nor'ester) and Belgian Dubbel (St. Vincent Dubbel) are fantastic. The Brewing Network actually had a Sunday Session with Scott Vaccaro owner/brewmaster. http://thebrewingnetwork.com/shows/The-Sunday-Session/The-Sunday-Session-08-31-08-OFF-WEEK
item.content:encoded:
One of my favorite gems out of NY. Their Barleywine (Nor’ester) and Belgian Dubbel (St. Vincent Dubbel) are fantastic. The Brewing Network actually had a Sunday Session with Scott Vaccaro owner/brewmaster.
http://thebrewingnetwork.com/shows/The-Sunday-Session/The-Sunday-Session-08-31-08-OFF-WEEK

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: You're awesome Marco, thanks for your continued support!
item.content:encoded: You’re awesome Marco, thanks for your continued support!

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description: Good show guys! Keep it up, I haven't missed one yet.
item.content:encoded: Good show guys! Keep it up, I haven’t missed one yet.
